case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. VS. ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA ABURO TRANSPORTATION $28,520.51 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,600.73 INTEREST, $470.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,416.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75268899) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA ABURO TRANSPORTATION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-2025
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75268899) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76037295), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. SERVED FEB-24-2025, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA ABURO TRANSPORTATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76659536) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 78111677) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75268899) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.02 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 76659536) AS TO DEFENDANT ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA ABURO TRANSPORTATION
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEYS FEES, INTEREST, AND COSTS IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76659536) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2026 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 76215104) AS TO DEFENDANT ABURO TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA ABURO TRANSPORTATION
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76659536) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-05-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
